Our Mission

MENU

To provide the necessary information in the fields of strategic planning, finance, accounting, marketing, human resources management and information systems so that graduates can effectively manage private sector and public institutions under changing environmental conditions, thus ensuring the correct determination of business objectives and the efficient use of resources.
